UserSecurityProfile.title: User Security Profile
UserSecurityProfile.description: Stores user security configurations including 2FA status and details

twoFactorSecret.description: The secret key used for TOTP 2FA

twoFactorPhone.description: The verified phone number for SMS 2FA
